---
title: "Installation"
description: "A short list of essentials, plus the CLI agents and software that round out an agentic engineering workflow."
toc: false
grid:
  sidebar-width: 0px
  margin-width: 0px
---

## Essentials

The bare minimum needed to follow the workshop hands-on.

{{< include resources/essentials.qmd >}}

## Agents

Install one of these 3 AI agents (or all of them if you want to collaborate across platforms):

{{< include resources/agents.qmd >}}

## Software

Install these software to support your agentic engineering workflow.

{{< include resources/software.qmd >}}
